entries.name: Vision
entries.definition: You perceive truth beyond ordinary sight.

entries.name: Prudence
entries.definition: You exercise wise judgment and foresight.

entries.name: Wisdom
entries.definition: You understand and apply deep truths.

entries.name: Courage
entries.definition: You face challenges with divine strength.

entries.name: Compassion
entries.definition: You feel and respond to others' needs.

entries.name: Justice
entries.definition: You uphold cosmic law and balance.

entries.name: Mercy
entries.definition: You extend divine grace and forgiveness.

entries.name: Patience
entries.definition: You allow divine timing to unfold.

entries.name: Temperance
entries.definition: You maintain perfect balance and moderation.

entries.name: Understanding
entries.definition: You grasp the deeper meaning of things.

entries.name: Truth
entries.definition: You embody and speak pure verity.
